payload.text:
In New Order Entry page
FOR MOBILE VIEW ONLY
NO CHANGES IN DESKTOP VIEW
Remove title
Keep background transparent and fix padding left right
At bottom Draft and Submit button equal width
DO NOT CHANGE ANYTHING ELSE NO LAYOUT NO DESIGN CHANGES

**Modifying Mobile Display**

I'm currently working on tailoring the `NewOrderEntry` component specifically for mobile users within `index.tsx`. The key update is eliminating the `pageTitle` heading (`h2` element with the `pageTitle` style) from the mobile view. This should clean up the interface.


**Adapting Mobile Layout**

I'm now implementing the mobile-specific styling for the `NewOrderEntry` component. I've successfully removed the title from the mobile view using conditional rendering within `index.tsx`. Moving forward, I'm focusing on the transparent background and padding adjustments for the main container (`styles.container`), ensuring it's transparent and properly padded on mobile. I'm also ensuring the Draft and Submit buttons have equal widths in the mobile footer.


**Fine-tuning Mobile Component**

I've implemented the changes to the `NewOrderEntry` component in `neworderentry.tsx`. The mobile title is now conditionally rendered, the container's background is transparent with adjusted padding, and both the "Draft" and "Submit Order" buttons are now equal width in the mobile footer. I've ensured all styles are applied as per the specifications, making the mobile interface cleaner and more user-friendly. I will test these adjustments thoroughly, now.


**Finalizing Mobile Adjustments**

I've now incorporated the outlined changes within `neworderentry.tsx`. The title is conditionally rendered, the container's background is transparent with adjusted padding, and the buttons in the mobile footer have equal widths. I'm satisfied that these updates accurately reflect the design specifications. I plan to thoroughly test the component on a mobile device for a seamless user experience, and then consider this part of the project complete.


**Implementing Mobile Enhancements**

I'm now implementing the mobile-specific alterations. I've updated `neworderentry.tsx` to conditionally hide the title and applied the transparent background and padding adjustments to the main container. Also, the equal button widths in the footer are already set up.  I'm ready for thorough testing of this component.

entries.description: Remove the page title in mobile view and adjust container padding and background for mobile.
